steps.title: Locate the direct textual evidence
steps.content: The passage states explicitly: “She was also the leader of what became known as the Cambridge movement.” The question asks what Gloria Richardson led, so the answer must come directly from this sentence.

steps.title: Eliminate each unsupported choice, then confirm the match
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'The Cambridge movement': Matches the passage verbatim — Gloria is named as its leader. ✓
  • Choice B — 'Her daughter Donna's high school': The passage says Gloria was inspired by Donna, not that she led her daughter’s school. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Protests to support environmental protections': Environmental protests are never mentioned; the passage concerns racial equality. ✗
  • Choice D — 'A new business in Cambridge, Maryland': No business is mentioned anywhere in the passage. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
